● Update(~/s/ev_invest/gitops/flake.nix)
  ⎿  Added 8 lines, removed 6 lines
      130            data."config.toml" = ''
      131              cors_allowed_origins = ["https://${mkHost ""}"]
      132            '';
      133 -          # Continuous WAL replication of the sqlite DB (litestream sidecar below).
      134 -          # Same bucket as `db push`/`pull` snapshots, nested under their prefix —
      135 -          # snapshot keys are flat (manifest.json, data-N.tgz), so no collision.
      136 -          # Replicate-only: restore stays a manual operator action, so it never
      137 -          # races the app's own R2 bootstrap pull on a fresh PVC.
      133 +          # Continuous WAL replication of the sqlite DB (litestream sidecar below),
      134 +          # which since the all-state-into-sqlite migration IS the whole backup +
      135 +          # restore story: the initContainer below restores fresh PVCs from it, and
      136 +          # rea's `nix run .#pull-prod-db` restores dev copies. 168h retention with
      137 +          # daily snapshots: litestream is the only backup, so a corruption noticed
      138 +          # on day 3 must still be recoverable.
      139            data."litestream.yml" = ''
      140              dbs:
      141                - path: /data/app.db
     ...
      144                      endpoint: https://1dbedc392b294bdef442b64e9030ba96.r2.cloudflarestorage.com
      145                      bucket: ev-invest-state
      146                      path: real-estate-allocation/litestream
      146 -                    retention: 24h
      147 +                    retention: 168h
      148 +                    snapshot-interval: 24h
      149            '';
      150          };
      151          reaBase = v_flakes.container.toManifests {

● Update(~/s/ev_invest/gitops/flake.nix)
  ⎿  Added 16 lines, removed 4 lines
      167              };
      168              # R2 creds come from the same sops-rendered secret the app reads;
      169              # litestream honors the LITESTREAM_* env pair globally.
      170 -            litestream = {
      171 -              name = "litestream";
      172 -              image = "litestream/litestream:0.3.13";
      173 -              args = [ "replicate" "-config" "/etc/litestream.yml" ];
      170 +            litestreamEnvMounts = {
      171                env = map (k: {
      172                  name = "LITESTREAM_${k}";
      173                  valueFrom.secretKeyRef = { name = "kubernetes-${k8sName reaContract.name}"; key = "R2_${k}"; };
     ...
      177                  { name = "config"; mountPath = "/etc/litestream.yml"; subPath = "litestream.yml"; }
      178                ];
      179              };
      180 +            litestream = litestreamEnvMounts // {
      181 +              name = "litestream";
      182 +              image = "litestream/litestream:0.3.13";
      183 +              args = [ "replicate" "-config" "/etc/litestream.yml" ];
      184 +            };
      185 +            # Fresh-PVC bootstrap. `-if-db-not-exists` only (a live PVC no-ops) —
      186 +            # deliberately NOT `-if-replica-exists`: with prod data + generations
      187 +            # already in R2 there is no legitimate empty start left, so a fresh PVC
      188 +            # with unreachable/missing R2 must fail the pod loudly, never boot empty.
      189 +            litestreamRestore = litestreamEnvMounts // {
      190 +              name = "litestream-restore";
      191 +              image = "litestream/litestream:0.3.13";
      192 +              args = [ "restore" "-if-db-not-exists" "-config" "/etc/litestream.yml" "/data/app.db" ];
      193 +            };
      194              spec' = spec // {
      195                containers = [ container' litestream ];
      196 +              initContainers = [ litestreamRestore ];
      197                imagePullSecrets = [{ name = "ghcr"; }];
      198                volumes = spec.volumes ++ [{
      199                  name = "config";

  Thought for 6s (ctrl+o to expand)
